Projects &
Dashboards

Six analytics projects spanning interactive dashboards, agricultural reporting, financial analysis, geospatial mapping, sports analytics, and predictive machine learning.

01 — Predictive Analytics & ML

Financial Metrics & Fraud Detection ML

Python · scikit-learn · Logistic Regression · KNN · Decision Tree

Two-part project using a 62,514 firm-year dataset spanning 18,673 companies (2000–2020). Part 1 established earnings persistence benchmarks via correlation analysis, random walk models, and DuPont decomposition. Part 2 built and compared three fraud detection classifiers — logistic regression, decision tree, and KNN — using Dechow et al. (2011) variables, achieving an AUC-ROC of 0.723. Includes a Suncorp insurance claims cost prediction model applying the same ML framework to a real Australian insurer.

Final Sample1,945 obs · 194 fraud / 1,751 non-fraud (10% rate)
ROA Persistencer = 0.578 · EPS persistence r = 0.624
Best AUC-ROC0.723 — Logistic Regression
Best Recall75.9% — Decision Tree (fraud detection)
Optimal Threshold0.11 · 62.1% fraud detection · 34.6% false alarm
Top FeatureSOFT_ASSETS (30.4% importance) — strongest fraud signal
Suncorp Model10-variable log-linear claims cost prediction model
MODEL COMPARISON — TEST SET PERFORMANCE

SUNCORP INSURANCE — CLAIMS COST PREDICTION MODEL
ln(Annual_Claims_Cost) = β₀ + β₁(Customer_Age) + β₂(Location_Risk_Score)
    + β₃(Claims_History_3Y) + β₄(ln(Policy_Value))
    + β₅(Coverage_Level) + β₆(Deductible_Amount)
    + β₇(Annual_Mileage) + β₈(Weather_Risk_Score)
    + β₉(Policy_Tenure) + β₁₀(Economic_Conditions) + ε
Customer_Age — policyholder age
Location_Risk_Score — postcode risk
Claims_History_3Y — 3-year history
ln(Policy_Value) — coverage amount
Coverage_Level — basic / comprehensive
Annual_Mileage — km/year driven
Weather_Risk_Score — disaster exposure
Policy_Tenure — years as customer
Target R² 0.45–0.55 · Enables risk-based pricing, fraud detection & premium optimisation for Suncorp Group
Pythonpandasscikit-learnseabornLogistic RegressionDecision TreeKNNGridSearchCVLog-Linear RegressionDechow et al. 2011

PART 2 · DECISION TREE FEATURE IMPORTANCE

02 — Agricultural Analytics

McFarlane's Row Spacing Analysis

Power BI · Agricultural Data · Geospatial

End-to-end agricultural analytics dashboard for McFarlane Agriculture Ltd's 2025-26 carrot growing season. Analysed row spacing and germination rates across 8 paddocks in the South Canterbury region, correlating planting precision with emergence outcomes to surface actionable agronomic insights for farm management.

Paddocks Analysed8 across South Canterbury, NZ
Mean Row Spacing79mm across all paddocks
Germination Range78% (Newtons Beach) → 94% (P18)
Non-Germinated101 gaps identified
Key FindingHigher spacing variability correlates with lower emergence
Power BIDAXAgricultural AnalyticsCorrelation AnalysisGoogle EarthKPI Cards
POWER BI DASHBOARD · ROW SPACING & GERMINATION ANALYSIS
GOOGLE EARTH MAP · 8 PADDOCK LOCATIONS, SOUTH CANTERBURY
03 — Geospatial Interactive Dashboard

New Zealand Earthquake Dashboard

R Shiny · Leaflet · Machine Learning

Full-stack interactive R Shiny dashboard analysing 15+ years of NZ seismic activity from USGS data. Features real-time Leaflet maps with magnitude/depth/date filters, a heatmap density overlay, Plotly scatter charts for temporal trends, and a machine learning magnitude prediction module — all across a multi-page, stakeholder-friendly layout.

Data SourceUSGS Earthquake Catalog 2010–2024
Magnitude RangeM4.0 to M7.8 (Kaikōura 2016)
Dashboard Pages5 (About, Methodology, Analysis, Predictions, Refs)
InteractivityMagnitude filter, depth slider, date range
RShinyLeafletPlotlyggplot2lubridateshinydashboard
INTERACTIVE LEAFLET MAP · MAGNITUDE CATEGORIES & FILTERS
HEATMAP DENSITY + MAGNITUDE OVER TIME (PLOTLY)
PREDICTIONS PAGE · ML MAGNITUDE FORECAST BY LOCATION & DEPTH (CHRISTCHURCH: M4.43)
04 — Multi-Stakeholder Power BI

Power BI Support Ticket Operations

Power BI · DAX · Star Schema

Advanced Power BI analysis of 534 support tickets. Designed a star schema data model with three dimension tables and built three tailored stakeholder dashboards — executive, operations manager, and customer service team — each with specific KPIs, gauge charts, DAX measures, and cross-filtering interactivity. Uncovered a 40% resolution time improvement trend over the analysis period.

Tickets Analysed534 across 3 teams
Closure Rate32.4% → benchmark 75%
Resolution Trend42hrs → 25hrs (↓40% over period)
Stakeholder ViewsExecutive / Ops Manager / CS Team
Data ModelStar schema: 1 fact + 3 dimension tables
Power BIDAXPower PivotStar SchemaKPI CardsGauge Charts

05 — Sports Analytics & Visualisation

NFL Combine Data Analysis 2018–2022

R · ggplot2 · Plotly · R Markdown

Exploratory and visual analysis of NFL Combine performance data across five draft years and 1,789 players. Built a composite speed tracker metric from 40-yard dash, cone drill, and shuttle drill times. Identified top athletic performers by position group using RAS scoring, explored strength-vs-explosiveness trade-offs, and ranked top NCAA programs by NFL draft output — all presented in an interactive R Markdown report.

Players1,789 across 22 positions, 2018–2022
Key MetricRAS (Relative Athletic Score) composite
Top WR 2022Isaiah Weston
VisualisationsBar, box plot, scatter, grouped bar (Plotly)
Rggplot2PlotlydplyrR MarkdownkableExtra
GRAPH 1 · POSITIONAL DISTRIBUTION BAR CHART (ggplot2)
GRAPH 2 · SPEED DRILLS BY POSITION · GRAPH 3 · WEIGHT vs SPEED SCATTER
06 — Financial Performance Reporting

KAT Insurance Financial Performance Analysis

Excel · Power Pivot · Contribution Margin Analysis

Comprehensive financial analysis of 64,544 insurance policies across 49 US states and 5 product lines using the IMPACT Cycle methodology. Corrected data quality issues, linked variable cost data via VLOOKUP, computed contribution margins for every policy, and built pivot table dashboards to surface underperforming geographies and product-level profitability insights for management.

Policies Analysed64,544 across 49 states, 6 regions
State Sales Target$775,000 minimum per state
Product LinesAuto, Home, Life, Health, Travel
Data Corrections4 spelling errors fixed; 245 VC combinations linked
MethodologyIMPACT Cycle (Identify → Monitor → Plan → Act → Communicate → Track)
ExcelPower PivotPivot TablesVLOOKUPContribution MarginIMPACT Cycle
FIG 1 · TOTAL SALES BY STATE — 9 STATES BELOW $775K THRESHOLD
FIG 2–3 · SALES BY PRODUCT TYPE & REGION · $40.6M TOTAL

FIG 5 · AVG CM PER POLICY — PROFESSIONAL $970 vs LIFE $202
FIG 6 · CM RATIO vs TOTAL CM — EFFICIENCY vs SCALE

University of Queensland
Maths · Quantitative Methods

Data analytics specialist with 5+ years turning complex datasets into strategic business insights across retail, finance, healthcare, sports, and agriculture. Currently working as Data Pricing Analytics Support at ABC Information Solutions, building custom dashboards in Power BI and Qlik for major clients including IGA, Foodworks, and BP.

Recently completed a Master of Data Analytics at Monash University with a High Distinction GPA — earning three Outstanding Achievement Awards for top performance in Predictive Analytics, Reporting Analytics, and Machine Learning.

My technical toolkit spans Python, R, SQL, Power BI, Qlik, and Tableau, with a particular focus on designing dashboards that communicate clearly to different stakeholder audiences. I've achieved a 30% query speed improvement in a live production environment and consistently build reporting solutions that bridge raw data and real decisions.

Beyond client work, I pursue personal analytics projects — including a personal research initiative for Women's American Flag Football, building an end-to-end analytics platform to surface player and team performance insights, presenting findings directly to coaches and players to support game-day decisions.

I hold a Bachelor of Science & Bachelor of Economics from UQ, majoring in Mathematics and Quantitative Methods — giving me a strong quantitative foundation to complement the practical analytics work I do every day.
